source_text:
ALEJANDRA REYES
alejandra.reyes@email.com | (512) 555-0184 | linkedin.com/in/alejandra-reyes
Austin, TX

SENIOR DATA ENGINEER

Results-driven data engineer with 7+ years building scalable data pipelines and analytics platforms. Expertise in real-time streaming, cloud data warehousing, and ML infrastructure. Led teams of up to 8 engineers.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Data Engineer | Stripe | San Francisco, CA (Remote)
March 2022 – Present
• Designed and deployed real-time fraud detection pipeline processing 2M+ events/hour using Apache Kafka and Flink
• Reduced data warehouse query costs by 45% through partition optimization and materialized views on Snowflake
• Led migration from Airflow to Dagster for 200+ data pipelines, improving observability and reducing failures by 60%
• Mentored 3 junior engineers; conducted 50+ technical interviews

Data Engineer II | Shopify | Ottawa, ON (Remote)
June 2019 – February 2022
• Built merchant analytics platform serving real-time dashboards to 1.7M+ merchants
• Implemented CDC pipelines using Debezium + Kafka Connect, reducing data freshness from 4 hours to <5 minutes
• Developed PySpark ETL jobs processing 15TB daily across multi-region AWS clusters
• Collaborated with ML team to build feature store serving 12 production models

Data Engineer | Dell Technologies | Austin, TX
July 2017 – May 2019
• Built automated data quality framework monitoring 500+ data sources
• Developed internal dashboards using Tableau + dbt reducing report generation from 2 days to 2 hours
• Migrated legacy Oracle data warehouse to AWS Redshift, cutting annual costs by $180K

EDUCATION
M.S. Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2017
B.S. Mathematics | University of California, Berkeley | 2015

SKILLS
Languages: Python, SQL, Scala, Java
Data: Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Streaming: Kafka, Flink, Spark Streaming, Kinesis
Orchestration: Dagster, Airflow, Prefect
Cloud: AWS (certified), GCP, Azure
Tools: dbt, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Git
ML: Feature stores, MLflow, model serving infrastructure

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Data Analytics – Specialty (2023)
• Snowflake SnowPro Core (2022)
• Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer (2021)
